data.name: Red Ops: Side Story
data.detailed_description:
RED OPS: Side Story is a short seductive 18+ visual novel where danger and desire collide. Play as Chris, a daring agent entangled in a world of secrets, intrigue, and irresistible men.

SYNOPSIS

Since the events of RED OPS: The First Infection, Chris is called back into action to unravel a new mystery. Step into his shoes as he navigates the shadows of Paradiso City, uncovers its darkest secrets, and forms a dynamic partnership with his new operative, Jake.

GAME FEATURES

  • ≈20k words (90 minutes);

  • In-game achievements;

  • Beautiful CGs;

  • Erotic scenes & cheeky dialogue;

  • Gay.

data.short_description: Dive into RED OPS: Side Story, a continuation of RED OPS: The First Infection. A short story with new mysteries to solve, more “team-building exercises,” and plenty of bonding between the guys—all from the perspective of your favorite operative, Chris!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 1GHz
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 記憶體: 512 MB 記憶體
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
